creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text: for context (and to justify this change): i'm trying to set up a backup KDC on a small arm64 system (RPi) which is too slow to build packages itself, i don't have any other arm64 systems i can build on, and since poudriere cross-building is mostly broken these days due to Rust, that means i'm relying on pkg.freebsd.org's binary packages.  so, having a binary package for krb5-ldap would allow me to make progress on this.
